failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, but 57.9 bar required
failure_modes.mitigation: Adjust BPR to 57.9 bar to match system requirements

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG exceeds pump inlet pressure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Regularly inspect and replace PFA tubing

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at Q=3.81543 mL/min with adjusted BPR for 120 min; monitor pressure stability
Conduct thermal cycling test on PFA tubing at 120°C for 100 cycles; inspect for degradation
Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
